title: Implement execution-to-issues skill
description: Stamp src/template/.claude/skills/execution-to-issues/SKILL.md (single file) as an .excn-native fork of to-issues, and mirror into root .claude/skills/ (Src-First). It appends to the partitioned backlog target with issue.schema.json as the contract, and is invocable standalone (not only as a grill substep).
acceptance_criteria: a run appends issues to the partitioned backlog target, each validating against issue.schema.json
the skill is invocable standalone, not only as a grill substep
root .claude/skills/ mirror is byte-identical to src (Src-First)
notes: Re-scoped from 'Resolve to-issues: schema-field output, no markdown body template' for sprint 2 under PRD-005; fork direction ruled by Brooks 2026-06-07. depends_on EXEC-030 — the partitioned backlog target must exist before the skill can append to it. Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead (sprint_2 item S2-4): execution-to-issues fork appends schema-valid issues to .excn/issues/backlog.json, issue.schema.json sole authority, globally-unique id scan across partitions, invocable standalone; alignment PASS; src+root mirrored.
